mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT user_id FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND user_id IN
#{uid}
SELECT user_id FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT circle_id, COUNT(*) AS member_count, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= #{todayStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_member_count FROM circle_member WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY circle_id
